problem id: 78d02fc5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHL(6) XOR NOT SHR(7)

examples:
  01010011 -> 01110010
  00010010 -> 00110111
  00110011 -> 11110011
  11101000 -> 01011101
  11001010 -> 01010101
  00101110 -> 11000111
  00101011 -> 10010011
  00011010 -> 00010111
  11100100 -> 01101101

query: 11011101
predicted answer: 11001001
